title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. rhellicani
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rhellicani, also known as the Rhellicani's Orchid or Dark Gymnadenia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its dark green leaves and purple-brown flowers. Traditionally, Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rhellicani has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues. Gymnadenia nigra subsp. rhellicani can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
